description: A transportation planner in Bologna is evaluating a dynamic speed management strategy for a busy urban corridor. Configure Variable Speed Signs (VSS) for the Bologna Pasubio traffic scenario using the lane IDs and speed schedule specified in /home/ga/SUMO_Scenarios/bologna_pasubio/vss_briefing.txt. Create the SUMO additional file /home/ga/SUMO_Scenarios/bologna_pasubio/pasubio_vss.add.xml containing a variableSpeedSign element with id="vss_peak_control" and the required speed steps. Update the configuration file at /home/ga/SUMO_Scenarios/bologna_pasubio/run.sumocfg to include this additional file and run the simulation to generate tripinfos.xml in the scenario directory.
